channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This Treatment Could Reverse Osteoarthritis Joint Damage With a Single Injection
item.description: Osteoarthritis has no cure, but researchers have developed new therapies that help aging or damaged joints repair themselves in a matter of weeks.

item.title: Pour les French Days 2026, le pack avec une Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic et une batterie externe 10 000 mAh est bradé à -130 €
item.description: Si vous cherchez une bonne montre connectée, la Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic, notée 8/10, dans un pack avec une batterie externe est en promo à 399,99 euros au lieu de 529,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: 'Organizations need to stop workarounds and regain control': Report finds many firms don't know what their workers are sharing with AI tools
item.description: Workers are using unapproved AI, while AI agents amplify visibility issues by accessing and sharing the wrong data.

item.title: Cyber Essentials update could put your public sector contracts at risk
item.description: What is Cyber Essentials and why being unprepared for the April update could put your public sector contracts at risk.

item.title: J’ai testé l’enceinte connectée Denon Home 200 et malgré sa compacité, elle sonne comme une grande
item.description: Architecture audio bien pensée, pouvant servir à la fois pour de la musique ou du Home Cinéma sans oublier son caractère multiroom, l’enceinte versatile Denon Home 200 entend jouer un rôle prépondérant dans votre logis. Mais est-elle si pratique et agréable ?

item.title: This Indigenous Language Survived Russian Occupation. Can It Survive YouTube?
item.description: YouTube’s search and recommendation algorithms are driving children to Russian-language content even when they seek out videos in Kyrgyz, creating a cultural shift that concerns some parents.

item.title: AI is turning every story into raw material
item.description: The promise of ‘liquid content’ is that every story can become video, audio, or something else. But do audiences want it? There’s an idea in AI called “liquid content.” It typically refers to the idea of morphing the facts, ideas, and expressions from one medium to another. The most well-known example is a feature within Google’s NotebookLM: Once you’ve filled a folder with various kinds of data, it can whip up a podcast about that data, enlisting a couple of cheery AI-generated voices to give you an overview, analysis, or debate....

item.title: Uber wants to be your travel agent, concierge, and personal shopper next
item.description: The company’s latest expansion beyond rides signals bigger ‘everything app’ ambitions while raising fresh questions about convenience and cost. The company that pulled onto the road nearly 16 years ago as UberCab increasingly seems less interested in driving than in what users do before and after summoning a ride through its app.

item.title: The rising cost of technical debt in IT service management
item.description: How technical debt quietly slows ITSM platforms and why governance determines innovation success.

item.title: 007 First Light lets players blast enemies with a watch laser, shoot darts from a spy phone, and more — 'Pretty much all of our gadgets are usable in combat' developer says
item.description: The 007 First Light senior combat designer explains how gadgets can be used in combat.

item.title: Mac mini introuvable, Mac Studio aussi : Apple s’est planté sur la demande, et la mémoire vive n’est pas en cause
item.description: Apple a vendu pour 8,4 milliards de dollars de Mac au dernier trimestre, en hausse de 6 %. Et pourtant, son patron passe son temps à s'excuser de ne pas en avoir assez en stock.

item.title: Ce smartphone Android aura 9 ans de mises à jour, et ce n’est pas grâce à Google
item.description: Lancé en 2019, le Fairphone 3 s'apprête à tirer sa révérence du côté de son fabricant officiel. Mais grâce à un système d'exploitation alternatif open source, l'appareil va repousser les limites de la longévité dans l'univers de la tech.

item.title: Apple’s next CEO is a ‘hardware guy.’ Here’s what I hope that means
item.description: As someone who uses a wide range of devices, I know that Apple doesn’t always ship the best hardware available. Here’s what I’d like to see change. It’s understandable that following the announcement that John Ternus will succeed Tim Cook as Apple CEO, people will pore over his résumé for signs of how the company might change. Cook was famously an operations and logistics wizard, handpicked by Steve Jobs to manage Apple with his trademark efficiency. But his successor is more of a mystery. ...

item.title: Volla Phone Plinius : le smartphone allemand qui mise tout sur la batterie remplaçable et l’absence de Google
item.description: Un smartphone allemand, sans Google, avec une batterie qu'on change soi-même au tournevis. À 598 €, le Volla Phone Plinius vise une niche très précise : ceux qui en ont marre de jeter leur téléphone tous les trois ans.

item.title: The best cheap Bluetooth speakers for summer — colorful, rugged, party-ready speakers from £24.99
item.description: These speakers all pack a punch when it comes to sound quality, and don't mind being drizzled on either — perfect for a UK summer gathering.

item.title: Target is celebrating Pokémon’s 30th anniversary with a massive exclusive collection — how to buy
item.description: For four days, Walmart is dropping exclusive Pokémon TCG collectibles for Walmart+ members.

item.title: Encryption breaking technology is now 20x cheaper and CEOs should be very worried
item.description: Most organizations still talk about post-quantum migration as though it were a normal upgrade cycle. It is not.

item.title: When it comes to creativity, Darwin, Tchaikovsky, and Maya Angelou all saw the importance of this habit
item.description: The counterintuitive secret of history’s most creative minds. A few times every month, I push and force my brain to come up with new ideas. The process is counterintuitive. I become bored on purpose. I believe an idle mind connects better dots. I feel guilty every time. But I push through it. I’m supposed to be working. I have a to-do list and emails to respond to. And I deliberately allow my mind to do nothing. ...

item.title: Bosch fait sauter le verrou : votre vélo électrique va (enfin) pouvoir parler à votre GPS Garmin
item.description: En ouvrant les données de l’assistance pour vélos électriques, Bosch permet ainsi de concentrer sa conduite sur d’autres appareils, d’abord sur les compteur GPS Garmin Edge.

item.title: Vous avez un VTT électrique à moteur Bosch ? Cette mise à jour gratuite va décupler ses performances
item.description: Dans sa nouvelle mise à jour à destination des VTTistes, Bosch permet l'augmentation de couple ses moteurs pour vélos électriques jusqu’à 120 Nm, tout en ajoutant des fonctions hautes performances pour les portions techniques.
